name: XBatCat
customLogicReason: kotatsu intercept() retries a failed image request against a pool of mirror image servers (https://n03, k06, ...) by rewriting the SERVER_PATTERN host prefix. That is a transport concern the SourceEngine contract does not model; getPageImageUrl returns the primary GraphQL image url and the mirror-server fallback is left as a future native-transport hook. All parsing (GraphQL browse/detail/chapter/page) is fully covered by the generic engine.
